hero.title:
Your athlete's
rank,
immutable.
hero.subtitle: Anyone can verify your student's belt in seconds — just scan a QR Code. Forever. No forgery possible.

problem.title: Paper certificates are easy to forge.

stat1.desc: of certification platforms fail due to lack of standards

stat2.desc: of referees have no way to verify real rank

stat3.desc: of training anyone can fake with a printer

solution.title: A sprint to modernize how your organization certifies athletes.

item1.title: Instant verification
item1.desc: Anyone scans the QR Code and sees the athlete's full history in 0.3 seconds.

item2.title: Cryptographically immutable
item2.desc: Unique SHA-256 hash per graduation. No one can alter it — not even the organization, not even us.

item3.title: Lifetime passport
item3.desc: The athlete keeps their link forever. Switch organizations, close the school — the passport remains.

step1.title: The organization registers its athletes
step1.desc: Name, photo, and ID. The system blocks duplicates — no athlete can have two profiles.

step2.title: Record the graduation
step2.desc: Select the athlete, the new belt, the date, and who graded. Hash generated automatically.

step3.title: Anyone can verify
step3.desc: Scan the QR. See the athlete's complete digital passport. Signed. Forever.

search.title: Find an athlete
search.subtitle: certified by your organization
search.emptyDesc: Register your organization and issue the first certificate.

pricing.title: You only pay when you grade.
pricing.subtitle: No monthly fee. No contract. Credits never expire.
pricing.neverExpire: Credits never expire. Use them anytime.

testimonials.title: Once you try it, there's no going back.

cta.title: Your organization deserves this.
cta.subtitle: Free signup. You only pay when you grade an athlete.
cta.disclaimer: No credit card · No contract · Cancel anytime
